stemHtml: The maximum certificated taxi (or ramp) mass is that mass to which an aeroplane may be loaded prior to engine start. It is…

options.a: a value which varies with airfield temperature and altitude. Corrections are listed in the Flight Manual.
options.b: a value which is only affected by the outside air temperature. Corrections are calculated from data given in the Flight Manual.
options.c: a fixed value which is listed in the Flight Manual.
options.d: a value which varies only with airfield altitude. Standard corrections are listed in the Flight Manual.
